description: This file is a Spring Boot configuration class that sets up dependency injection for notification-related services and providers, including email and SMS providers, with logic to select appropriate implementations based on configuration properties.

classes.name: NotificationConfig
classes.description: A Spring configuration class that defines beans for email and SMS providers and the notification service, with logic to determine provider implementations based on configuration properties.

methods.name: emailProvider
methods.description: Creates and returns an EmailProvider implementation based on notification properties and available credentials, defaulting to stub if none are detected.

methods.name: smsProvider
methods.description: Creates and returns an SmsProvider implementation based on notification properties.

methods.name: notificationService
methods.description: Creates and returns a NotificationService bean that uses configured email and SMS providers.

methods.name: notBlank
methods.description: Utility method to check if a string is neither null nor blank.
